name: com.cidonix.unibridge
description: Local MCP tools that let AI coding agents inspect, edit, capture, and validate Unity Editor projects through a per-project bridge and relay.

_upm.changelog:
### Changed

- Bundled relay 1.1.0-build.15 now recovers RefreshAssets connection loss caused by Unity import/domain reload. The relay reconnects, waits for editor readiness, returns compilation diagnostics, and reports reloadBoundary, reconnectRequired, reloadSafe, and nextSuggestedCalls instead of surfacing a transport-level Unity connection closed MCP error.

### Added

- Added UniBridge_Discover, a read-only ping/discovery tool with searchable aliases for Codex/tool_search: UniBridge, Unity, ValidateScript, RefreshAssets, RequestScriptCompilationNoWait, WaitForReadyAfterReload, GetCompilationDiagnostics, ReadConsole, DiagnosticSummary, ClearConsole, PlayMode, WaitForPlayMode, WaitForEditMode, and ValidateAdditiveSceneRegistration.
- Added UniBridge_ValidateAdditiveSceneRegistration for read-only additive scene setup validation: scene/meta GUIDs, metadata references, Build Settings, scenesManager registration, boundary arrays, stale template references, and optional neighbor checks.
- Bundled relay 1.1.0-build.14 exposes alias-rich _server_info metadata so newly connected Codex sessions have an obvious UniBridge discovery/status entry point.

### Changed

- Updated bundled Roslyn compiler assemblies Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.dll and Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.CSharp.dll from 3.11.x to 5.3.0 for newer C# syntax parsing and diagnostics coverage.
- UniBridge_BatchActions can run UniBridge_Discover and UniBridge_ValidateAdditiveSceneRegistration as read-only batch steps with aliases such as discover, validate_additive_scene, additive_scene_validation, and scene_registration.
- ToolGuide and DomainCatalog now advertise the compile diagnostics, Play Mode boundary, and additive scene validation workflows with explicit searchable action names.

### Fixed

- UniBridge_ValidateScript now scopes Update() string-allocation warnings to concrete string interpolation, string concatenation, string.Concat, or ToString expressions inside Update(), with line/column and expression snippets.
- ValidateAdditiveSceneRegistration now scopes stale-reference scans to the target scene, target metadata, and target scenesManager entry. It no longer reports legal sibling scene entries in the global scenesManager.prefab as stale TemplateSceneName references.

### Previous Changes

- Added reload-safe Play Mode lifecycle actions: UniBridge_ManageEditor Action=RequestPlayModeNoWait, Action=WaitForPlayMode, and Action=WaitForEditMode.
- Bundled relay 1.1.0-build.13 can recover Play Mode domain reload connection loss and return structured diagnostics instead of a transport-level Unity connection closed error.
- Play/ExitPlayMode requests now return a controlled queued boundary response when they may trigger Unity domain reload, including reconnectRequired, reloadSafe, batchBoundary, and nextSuggestedCalls.
- UniBridge_BatchActions now stops successfully at reload-safe Play Mode boundaries so later steps do not run against stale pre-reload editor state.
- ToolGuide and DomainCatalog now recommend split-phase Play Mode smoke tests: queue Play, reconnect/wait, then read console diagnostics.
- Added reload-safe editor compile actions: UniBridge_ManageEditor Action=RequestScriptCompilationNoWait and Action=WaitForReadyAfterReload.
- Bundled relay 1.1.0-build.12 can recover script-compilation domain reload connection loss and return structured diagnostics instead of a transport-level Unity connection closed error.
- RequestScriptCompilation with WaitForCompletion=true now returns a controlled queued compile response instead of waiting inline through an assembly reload that can recreate the MCP bridge.
- ToolGuide and BatchActions now recommend validate -> refresh -> RequestScriptCompilationNoWait -> WaitForReadyAfterReload -> diagnostics/console for script workflows.
- Added UniBridge_ValidateScript to UniBridge_BatchActions as a read-only script validation step with aliases validate_script, script_validate, validate_cs, and cs_validation.
- BatchActions now normalizes Uri/path aliases for script validation, reports ValidateScript impact paths as read-only, and documents the validate -> refresh -> compile -> wait -> console workflow.
- SceneObjectLocator ByComponent matching now scans live components in scenes and Prefab Stage by short type name, full type name, assembly-qualified name, MonoScript name/path/GUID, and serialized m_EditorClassIdentifier aliases.
- TypeSchema InspectGameObject now supports IncludeInactive target lookup and returns component script identity plus namespace-migration diagnostics.
- ManageGameObject AddComponent now returns an actionable UI Graphic conflict hint when an object already has a Graphic such as TextMeshProUGUI before adding Image.
- ContextSnapshot IncludeConsole now defaults to ConsoleSummaryMode=Compact, omitting long recentSamples/timelineHighlights dumps while keeping totals and grouped critical/warning/spam issues.
- ManagePrefab save_stage and close_stage responses now include before/current Prefab Stage state and explain when Unity has already closed or reloaded the stage.
- Added ReadConsole action aliases CreateMarker, ReadSinceMarker, and ClearConsole for clearer post-change console checks.
- ManageGameObject now resolves inactive scene objects consistently through the shared SceneObjectLocator for modify, delete, component, parent, and sibling operations when IncludeInactive/SearchInactive is true.
- BatchActions impact and rollback path normalization now handles project-relative /Assets, /Packages, /ProjectSettings, and project:/ URI forms before checking file existence.
- ManageScene and batch scene-step validation now accept full scene asset paths in Path, including /Assets/... and project:/Assets/... forms.
- Executing BatchActions now propagates DryRun=false to nested dry-run-aware tools or reports an execution warning if a nested tool still returns dryRun=true.
- Batch validation now accepts ManageEditor GetCompilationDiagnostics, keeping ToolGuide/batch guidance aligned with the editor lifecycle tool.
